About Me

Senior Backend Engineer with 9+ years building scalable, production-ready systems. Specialized in backend architecture, event-driven systems, and distributed applications with Node.js and TypeScript.

Current Work

Senior Backend Engineer - Building competitive intelligence platforms with focus on backend architecture and distributed systems. Working with NestJS, Kafka, PostgreSQL, and AWS to implement scalable, event-driven solutions.

Technical Expertise

Primary Stack

  • • JavaScript/TypeScript
  • • Node.js, NestJS, Express
  • • React.js, Next.js

Architecture & Patterns

  • • Microservices, Event-Driven
  • • Clean Architecture, SOLID
  • • Message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ)
  • • REST APIs, Authentication (OAuth, JWT)

Infrastructure

  • • AWS (Lambda, ECS, S3, RDS)
  • • Docker, Docker Compose
  • • PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB
  • • CI/CD pipelines

Currently Learning

  • • Python & Go
  • • Advanced Kafka patterns
  • • System Design at scale

Technical Writing

I write about software architecture, backend systems, and lessons learned building production systems at scale. Check out my blog for technical deep dives on topics like DDD patterns, event-driven architecture, and Node.js best practices.
